data.color_change_gcode: M600\nG1 E0.3 F1500 ; prime after color change

data.printer_settings_id: Original Prusa i3 MK3S & MK3S+ 0.25 nozzle
data.start_gcode:
M862.3 P "[printer_model]" ; printer model check
M862.1 P[nozzle_diameter] ; nozzle diameter check
M115 U3.14.1 ; tell printer latest fw version
G90 ; use absolute coordinates
M83 ; extruder relative mode
M104 S[first_layer_temperature] ; set extruder temp
M140 S[first_layer_bed_temperature] ; set bed temp
M190 S[first_layer_bed_temperature] ; wait for bed temp
M109 S[first_layer_temperature] ; wait for extruder temp
G28 W ; home all without mesh bed level
G80 X{first_layer_print_min[0]} Y{first_layer_print_min[1]} W{(first_layer_print_max[0]) - (first_layer_print_min[0])} H{(first_layer_print_max[1]) - (first_layer_print_min[1])} ; mesh bed levelling
G1 Z0.2 F720
G1 Y-3 F1000 ; go outside print area
G92 E0
G1 X60 E8 F700 ; intro line
G1 X100 E12.5 F700 ; intro line
G92 E0
M221 S{if layer_height<0.075}100{else}95{endif}

; Don't change E value below. Excessive value can damage the printer.
{if print_settings_id=~/.*@0.25 nozzle MK3.*/}M907 E430 ; set extruder motor current{endif}

data.printer_settings_id: Original Prusa i3 MK3 0.8 nozzle
data.start_gcode:

M115 U3.14.1 ; tell printer latest fw version

{if filament_settings_id[initial_tool]=~/.*Prusament PA11.*/}

G1 X60 E9 F1000 ; intro line
G1 X100 E9 F1000 ; intro line
{else}
G1 Z0.2 F720
G1 Y-3 F1000 ; go outside print area
G92 E0
G1 X60 E9 F1000 ; intro line
G1 X100 E12.5 F1000 ; intro line
{endif}
G92 E0
M221 S95
